exercises.name: Light jog in place
exercises.notes: Keep an upright posture and warm up the ankles and knees.

exercises.name: High knees
exercises.notes: Drive knees up to hip height, pump your arms.

exercises.name: Butt kicks
exercises.notes: Bring heels to glutes, keep torso slightly forward.

exercises.name: Leg swings (front-to-back)
exercises.notes: 15 swings per leg. Hold a wall for balance, swing forward and back.

exercises.name: Leg swings (side-to-side)
exercises.notes: 15 swings per leg. Swing across body and out to the side.

exercises.name: Ankle circles
exercises.notes: 15 circles each direction per foot. Loosens ankles for jumping.

exercises.name: Bodyweight squats (slow)
exercises.notes: Focus on deep range and slow tempo to warm up hips.

exercises.name: Hip circles
exercises.notes: 15 circles each direction. Stand wide and rotate hips.

exercises.name: Walking lunges
exercises.notes: 10 reps each leg. Step forward and lower hips dynamically.

exercises.name: Bodyweight squats (ATG)
exercises.notes: Thighs below parallel. Chest up, weight in heels.

exercises.name: Jump squats
exercises.notes: Explode up, land softly on balls of feet. Max height.

exercises.name: Forward lunges
exercises.notes: 12 reps each leg. Front knee behind toes. Drive through the heel.

exercises.name: Reverse lunges
exercises.notes: 12 reps each leg. Step backward. Easier on knees, good glute load.

exercises.name: Calf raises
exercises.notes: Slow 3-second lowering. Essential for vertical jump power.

exercises.name: Wall sit
exercises.notes: Back flat against wall, thighs parallel to the ground.

exercises.name: Single-leg glute bridges
exercises.notes: 15 reps each leg. Squeeze glute at top. Hold 2 seconds.

exercises.name: Squat hold pulses
exercises.notes: Hold at bottom of squat, pulse up and down 3 inches.

exercises.name: Single-leg stand (eyes open)
exercises.notes: 45s each leg. Squeeze core, lock hip, fix focus on a wall point.

exercises.name: Single-leg stand (eyes closed)
exercises.notes: 30s each leg. Critical for vision compensation and ankle stability.

exercises.name: Single-leg mini squats
exercises.notes: 10 reps each leg. Bend knee slightly, keeping it aligned with toes.

exercises.name: Single-leg deadlift (hold volleyball)
exercises.notes: 8 reps each leg. Hinge at hips, lower ball toward ground, leg straight back.

exercises.name: Tandem stance walk
exercises.notes: 10 steps forward + 10 back (heel-to-toe, eyes closed). Keep posture tall.

1.notes: Stationary wall passing at 2m. Straight platform, hit forearm.

2.notes: Moving forearm passing. Shuffle side to side between passes.
2.goal: Goal: 20 consecutive passes on the move

3.notes: Hard wall digs. Stand 5m back, hit hard at wall, dig the fast rebound.

1.notes: Stationary overhead passes at 2m. Triangle hands, fingertip contact.

2.notes: Alternating forearm and overhead passes. Continuous shift.

3.notes: High wall digs to self-sets. Dig hard ball, then set to yourself.

1.notes: Set to a consistent 50cm box target on wall. Hands above forehead.
1.goal: Goal: 15 consecutive sets in target zone

2.notes: Set to alternating left/right targets. Shuffle to align.

3.notes: Low, rapid set rally. Fast-paced, low arc against wall.
3.goal: Goal: 10 quick sets in a row

1.notes: Set ball straight up in place. Keep hands soft and triangle shape.

2.notes: Set on the move. Set straight up while shuffling left and right.

3.notes: Kneeling self-sets. Removes leg drive to isolate wrists.

1.notes: Bow-and-arrow arm draw. Focus on high elbow and wrist snap.

2.notes: Approach footwork with arm swing (no jump). Focus on step timing.

3.notes: Full approach and jump swing. Max vertical reach and arm velocity.

1.notes: Toss up, hit down into wall. Contact high, snap wrist for topspin.

2.notes: Approach steps then hit against wall (no jump). Move with toss.

3.notes: Continuous wall hit rally. Let ball bounce once, hit again.

1.notes: L-R-L (or R-L-R) footwork steps. Speed up the last two steps.

2.notes: Approach with vertical jump. Focus on blocking forward momentum.

3.notes: Transition-to-approach. Start back, sprint forward, approach.

1.notes: Toss at wall. Track with eyes, point finger at ball. Do not catch.

2.notes: Peripheral catch. Fix eyes on wall mark, toss ball side, catch.

3.notes: Rapid angle reads. Toss hard at angles, predict path, pre-position.

1.notes: Bounce ball, close eyes. Clap exactly when it hits ground.

2.notes: Toss ball up, close eyes. Track sound and catch before second bounce.

3.notes: Bounce off wall, close eyes. Track rebound sound and catch.

exercises.name: Standing quad stretch
exercises.notes: 30s each leg. Pull heel to glutes, keep knees together.

exercises.name: Standing hamstring stretch
exercises.notes: 30s each leg. Fold forward at hips, reach for toes.

exercises.name: Calf stretch against wall
exercises.notes: 30s each leg. Press back heel down, lean forward into wall.

exercises.name: Forearm & wrist stretch
exercises.notes: 30s each arm. Pull fingertips back to stretch forearms.

exercises.name: Deep breathing
exercises.notes: Slow deep breaths, nose to mouth. Lower heart rate.

exercises.name: Jumping jacks
exercises.notes: Full extension of arms, jump lightly on toes.

exercises.name: Arm circles
exercises.notes: 30s forward, 30s backward. Start small, increase to full circles.

exercises.name: Shoulder pass-throughs
exercises.notes: Hold a towel wide, pass arms over head to lower back and forward.

exercises.name: Torso twists
exercises.notes: Stand wide, twist torso side to side, let arms swing loosely.

exercises.name: Inchworms
exercises.notes: Walk hands out to push-up plank, walk feet in to hands.

exercises.name: Push-up position shoulder taps
exercises.notes: 12 taps each side. Maintain solid plank, tap opposite shoulder.

exercises.name: Scapular push-ups
exercises.notes: In plank, sink shoulders together and push apart. Arms straight.

exercises.name: Wrist circles & stretches
exercises.notes: Rotate wrists, stretch fingers back. Prepares hands for setting.

exercises.name: Push-ups
exercises.notes: Full range of motion. Keep elbows tucked at 45 degrees.

exercises.name: Diamond push-ups
exercises.notes: Hands close, fingers forming a diamond. Builds triceps for attacking.

exercises.name: Pike push-ups
exercises.notes: Hips high in V-shape. Low head to floor. Builds shoulders.

exercises.name: Wide push-ups
exercises.notes: Hands wider than shoulders. Targets chest pressing power.

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.notes: Straight line from head to heels. Squeeze core and glutes.

exercises.name: Side plank
exercises.notes: 25s each side. Build rotational torso strength for hits.

exercises.name: Dead bugs
exercises.notes: 12 reps each side. Lie on back, lower opposite arm/leg to floor.

exercises.name: Superman holds
exercises.notes: Raise chest and thighs off floor. Squeeze lower back.

exercises.name: Bicycle crunches
exercises.notes: 20 total reps. Touch elbow to opposite knee, rotate torso.

exercises.name: Plank to push-up
exercises.notes: Start in forearm plank, push up one hand at a time to standard plank.

exercises.name: Single-leg reach
exercises.notes: 10 reps each leg. Balance on one foot, reach forward to touch floor.

exercises.name: Tandem stance (eyes closed)
exercises.notes: 30s each foot forward. Rest heel of front foot against toe of back foot.

exercises.name: Single-leg arm swings
exercises.notes: 12 reps each leg. Simulate volleyball hitting arm swing while balancing.

exercises.name: Yoga tree pose
exercises.notes: 30s each leg. Press sole of foot to inner thigh, reach arms high.

exercises.name: Single-leg rotation
exercises.notes: 8 reps each leg. Twist torso side to side while balancing on one foot.

1.notes: Pass to different wall spots, shuffle to get behind. Move feet.

2.notes: Shuffle further. Pass, shuffle 2 steps, pass back to center.

3.notes: Low-to-high alternating shuffle passes. Drop low, stand high.

1.notes: Alternate between low forearm pass and high overhead pass.

2.notes: Rapid low-high. Keep the contact swift, stay in lower stance.

3.notes: Dig hard ball (low) then self-set (high) then hit against wall.

1.notes: Alternate setting to left and right targets on wall (1m apart).

2.notes: Set further apart (2m targets). Shuffle to align after setting.

3.notes: Target sets with random shifts. React to bad rebounds.

1.notes: Set, shuffle 2 steps, set. Keep ball high to give time to move.

2.notes: Lower arc sets on the move. Faster shuffles needed.

3.notes: Set-shuffle-circle. Set while moving in a circular path.

1.notes: Step L-R-L forward, toss, hit standing (no jump). Clean contact.

2.notes: Increase swing speed. Focus on full shoulder-to-wrist snap.

3.notes: Vary hitting direction. Hit deep wall, then short ground bounce.

1.notes: Hold ball high. Snap wrist down to bounce ball to ground. 30+ reps.

2.notes: Alternating hand snaps. Drop-snap, catch, snap other hand.

3.notes: One-handed fast dribbles against floor. pure finger/wrist snap.

1.notes: Full approach and jump. Focus on landing softly on both feet.

2.notes: Add blocking arm extension at peak. Simulate net block.

3.notes: Consecutive jumps. Land and immediately transition into next.

1.notes: Toss ball at angle. Predict bounce, move body to intercept. Catch.

2.notes: Dig instead of catch. Move, get low platform under ball, pass up.

3.notes: Set instead of dig. Fast feet, get under ball, overhead set up.

1.notes: Fix gaze on wall mark. Move ball slowly in periphery. Detect it.

2.notes: Toss and catch in peripheral vision. Do not turn head.

3.notes: Set ball to self using only peripheral vision. Focus on a wall mark.

1.notes: Close eyes. Toss ball hand-to-hand. Develop ball feeling.

2.notes: Toss ball up slightly, eyes closed, and catch cleanly.

3.notes: Clap before catching. Toss up, close eyes, clap, catch ball.

exercises.name: Cross-body shoulder stretch
exercises.notes: 30s each arm. Pull arm across chest, lock with other forearm.

exercises.name: Tricep overhead stretch
exercises.notes: 30s each arm. Raise elbow, pull back behind head.

exercises.name: Child's pose
exercises.notes: Kneel, sit on heels, reach arms forward on floor. Rest spine.

exercises.name: Cobra stretch
exercises.notes: Lie face down, press hands to lift chest off floor. Stretches core.

exercises.name: Wrist circles
exercises.notes: Rotate wrists gently, shake out arms and fingers.

exercises.name: Skip in place
exercises.notes: Skip lightly, warming up calves and shoulders.

exercises.name: Side shuffles
exercises.notes: Shuffle 3m left and right in a low ready stance.

exercises.name: Grapevine (Karaoke)
exercises.notes: Cross-step hips left and right. Warms up lateral hip agility.

exercises.name: Forward-backward sprints
exercises.notes: Sprint 5m forward, backpedal 5m back. 8 total rounds.

exercises.name: Hip circles
exercises.notes: 15 circles each direction. Opens up hip socket.

exercises.name: Dynamic lunge with twist
exercises.notes: 10 each side. Lunge forward, rotate torso over front knee.

exercises.name: A-skips
exercises.notes: Rhythmic high knee skip, driving foot down. Builds elastic power.

exercises.name: Lateral bounds (slow)
exercises.notes: Jump side-to-side, hold landing 2 seconds. Focus on ankle control.

exercises.name: Lateral lunges
exercises.notes: 12 reps each leg. Step wide, sit hip back, explode back to center.

exercises.name: Tuck jumps
exercises.notes: Knees to chest, land softly on balls of feet. Max height.

exercises.name: Broad jumps
exercises.notes: Jump forward as far as possible, landing in stable squat posture.

exercises.name: Skater jumps
exercises.notes: 16 total. Leap side-to-side, sweep leg behind. Focus on speed.

exercises.name: Split squat jumps
exercises.notes: 10 total reps. Jump from lunge position and swap legs in mid-air.

exercises.name: Quick feet
exercises.notes: Patter feet in place as fast as possible. Stay low in athletic stance.

exercises.name: Depth drop to jump
exercises.notes: Step off step (30cm), land softly, immediately explode up max height.

exercises.name: Single-leg hops (forward)
exercises.notes: 8 hops each leg. Continuous forward hopping. Builds ankle reactive force.

exercises.name: Lateral shuffle to sprint
exercises.notes: Shuffle 3m, then plant and sprint 5m forward. Simulates ball pursuit.

exercises.name: Single-leg hop (forward/back)
exercises.notes: 10 reps each leg. Hop forward and back over a line on one foot.

exercises.name: Single-leg hop (side-to-side)
exercises.notes: 10 reps each leg. Hop side-to-side on one foot. Builds stabilizers.

exercises.name: Eyes-closed stand with head turns
exercises.notes: 25s each leg. Balance on one foot, close eyes, rotate head slowly.

exercises.name: Single-leg squat to toe touch
exercises.notes: 6 reps each leg. Squat on one leg, reach forward and touch toe.

exercises.name: Reactive single-leg catch
exercises.notes: 8 reps each leg. Toss ball up, jump and land on one foot, holding catch.

1.notes: Rally forearm passes fast. Close distance (1.5m), keep hands moving.

2.notes: Vary distance. Move closer, then further back during fast rally.

3.notes: Alternate shuffle rally. Rally fast while moving left and right.

1.notes: Toss, hit wall hard, dig rebound. Low stance, lock platform.

2.notes: Stand 4m back. Hitter swing simulation. Read bounce, react low.

3.notes: Continuous spike-dig. Hit, dig, self-set, hit again immediately.

1.notes: Low, rapid set rally against wall. Flat arc. Fingertip wrist snaps.

2.notes: Quick sets while dropping into partial squat and rising up.

3.notes: Quick sets to moving targets. Small shuffles left/right.

1.notes: Forearm pass to wall, set the return. Alternate pass/set every touch.

2.notes: Increase rhythm speed. Stand closer. Fast hand transitions.

3.notes: Dig, set, head-snap (look away), and set backward to wall.

1.notes: Toss ball, approach, jump, and hit against wall. Land softly.

2.notes: Add hitting angle variety. Aim for deep or short spots.

3.notes: Self-set approach. Set ball high, transition back, approach, spike.

1.notes: Standing attacks to left/right wall targets. Focus on wrist snap direction.

2.notes: Approach steps (no jump) hitting targets. Timing arm snap.

3.notes: Jump attack to targets. Jump and aim for left/right marks.

1.notes: Toss ball hard at wall angles. Read bounce instantly, pre-position body.

2.notes: Catch ball behind back or between legs after bounce to test speed.

3.notes: React with immediate dig platform. Drop hips instantly to ball.
3.goal: Goal: 8 low digs from random angles

1.notes: Perform shuffle steps while tracking ball in periphery. Dual-task.
1.goal: Goal: Maintain gaze, keep feet moving

2.notes: Self-sets in peripheral vision while shuffling left/right.

3.notes: Alternate digs and sets in peripheral vision while shuffling.

1.notes: Shadow your own attack approach in front of wall mirror/reflection.
1.goal: Goal: Analyze shoulder and arm cues

2.notes: Practice hiding your hit. Approach, show hard hit, roll ball softly.

3.notes: Show spike, set backward at last millisecond. Advanced deception.

exercises.name: Pigeon stretch
exercises.notes: 30s each leg. Opens hips and glutes after jumping.

exercises.name: Seated forward fold
exercises.notes: Sit, legs straight, reach forward to stretch hamstrings and back.

exercises.name: Cat-cow stretches
exercises.notes: Alternate arching and rounding back on all fours. Mobilizes spine.

exercises.name: Neck stretch sequence
exercises.notes: Rotate and tilt head. Loosens neck muscles for visual tracking.

exercises.name: Deep breathing
exercises.notes: Relax body, slow deep breathing to conclude session.

exercises.name: Light jog with direction changes
exercises.notes: Jog in place, turning 90 degrees every 15 seconds.

exercises.name: High knee skips
exercises.notes: Skip forward and back, lifting knees high to chest.

exercises.name: Arm circles + wrist rotations
exercises.notes: Simultaneous arm swings and wrist rotations.

exercises.name: Bodyweight good mornings
exercises.notes: Hands behind head, hinge hips back. Stretches hamstrings.

exercises.name: World's greatest stretch
exercises.notes: 6 each side. Deep lunge with rotation, elbow to ankle.

exercises.name: Vertical jumps (50% effort)
exercises.notes: Light vertical jumps focusing on clean landing mechanics.

exercises.name: Inchworms with push-up
exercises.notes: Inchworm walkout + 1 push-up at the bottom of plank. 6 reps.

exercises.name: Lateral lunges (dynamic)
exercises.notes: 8 reps each side. Alternate lateral lunges with fluid transitions.

exercises.name: Burpees
exercises.notes: Part of Circuit A. Complete full push-up and explosive jump at top.

exercises.name: Squat to overhead press
exercises.notes: Part of Circuit A. Hold volleyball, deep squat → press ball overhead.

exercises.name: Mountain climbers
exercises.notes: Part of Circuit A. 24 reps total. Keep hips low, drive knees fast.

exercises.name: Reverse lunges
exercises.notes: Part of Circuit A. 12 reps each leg. Drive through front heel.

exercises.name: Push-ups with rotation
exercises.notes: Part of Circuit A. Push-up then rotate into side plank, alternate sides.

exercises.name: Star jumps
exercises.notes: Part of Circuit A. Explode in air, spread arms and legs. Land soft.

exercises.name: Squat jumps (max height)
exercises.notes: Part of Circuit B. Rest 60s. Maximum vertical jump height.

exercises.name: Plank shoulder taps
exercises.notes: Part of Circuit B. 16 reps total. Controlled tapping, hips stable.

exercises.name: Glute bridges (both legs)
exercises.notes: Part of Circuit B. Double leg bridge, squeeze glutes at peak.

exercises.name: Tricep dips
exercises.notes: Part of Circuit B. Perform on step/chair. Deep dip, chest open.

exercises.name: Leg raises
exercises.notes: Part of Circuit B. Lie on back, lower legs. Keep back flat on floor.

exercises.name: Single-leg deadlift with volleyball
exercises.notes: 10 reps each leg. Hinge hips, reach volleyball down, maintain line.

exercises.name: Balance on unstable surface
exercises.notes: 35s each leg. Fold a towel and balance on it. Sharpens stabilizers.

exercises.name: Heel-to-toe walk (eyes closed)
exercises.notes: 12 steps forward, 12 steps back. Walk straight line slowly.

exercises.name: Single-leg wall sit
exercises.notes: 15s each leg. Thighs parallel to floor, elevate one foot slightly.

exercises.name: Balance + volleyball self-set
exercises.notes: 8 sets each leg. Stand on one foot, set volleyball to self repeatedly.

1.notes: Stand 4m back from wall. Forearm pass. Demands more platform power.

2.notes: Stand 5m back from wall. Keep knees low, follow through with legs.

3.notes: Distance passes with movement. Alternating left/right shuffle.

1.notes: Alternate forearm and overhead passes. Continuous. Adjust foot stance.

2.notes: Speed up the alternating. Stand slightly closer (1.8m). Fast hands.

3.notes: Deep forearm pass → quick overhead set → back-set. High control.

1.notes: Kneel on floor and set against wall at 1.5m. Isolates fingers/wrists.

2.notes: Kneeling sets to target box on wall. Develop finger accuracy.

3.notes: Kneeling quick sets. Fast, low bounce sets, no pause.

1.notes: Face away from wall. Set backward over head to wall. Turn and receive.

2.notes: Continuous back-setting. Set backward, bounce off wall, back-set again.

3.notes: Back-set to specific wall target. Focus on arching back.

1.notes: Self-toss, hit wall as HARD as possible. Full rotation hips to wrist.

2.notes: Toss high, approach steps, hit wall at max force (no jump).

3.notes: Jump hit max power. Full approach, vertical leap, max arm speed.

1.notes: Hit wall, let it bounce once on floor, hit again. Keep rhythm going.

2.notes: Vary stance. Alternate between hitting left and right hands (snaps).

3.notes: No bounce rally. Volley hits against wall continuously (arm swing only).
3.goal: Goal: 8 direct wall hits without bounce

1.notes: Throw volleyball at floor angle so it hits wall unpredictably. Catch.

2.notes: Catch with single hand only. Alternate left and right hand catches.

3.notes: React with low dig platform. Digest the bounce off the wall.

1.notes: Balance on one foot, pass ball hand-to-hand. Look at wall mark.

2.notes: Balance on one foot, self-set. Gaze fixed on wall mark.

3.notes: Single-leg squat while passing ball hand-to-hand. Eyes fixed.

1.notes: Eyes closed. Play a full set mentally. See contacts and movements.

2.notes: Visualize recovering from error. See yourself correcting form.

3.notes: Visualize opponent attacks. See yourself blocking and digging them.

exercises.name: Figure-four stretch
exercises.notes: 30s each leg. Cross ankle over knee, sit back to stretch glutes.

exercises.name: Chest stretch at wall corner
exercises.notes: 30s each side. Forearm on wall, turn chest away. Relieves shoulders.

exercises.name: Seated spinal twist
exercises.notes: 30s each side. Twist torso to look behind you, knee hugged.

exercises.name: Forearm stretch
exercises.notes: 20s each arm. Press fingers down and back, stretching wrists.

exercises.name: Deep breathing
exercises.notes: Slow breaths, focus on total muscle relaxation.

exercises.name: Jog with direction changes
exercises.notes: Warm up ankles, shift directions every 10 seconds.

exercises.name: Dynamic stretch flow
exercises.notes: Continuous movement flowing from quad stretch to arm circles.

exercises.name: Defensive shuffles
exercises.notes: Stay low in defensive posture, shuffle rapidly left and right.

exercises.name: Vertical jumps (75% effort)
exercises.notes: Higher jumps, snap arms up, land in deep athletic stance.

exercises.name: Approach footwork
exercises.notes: 12 reps. Explosive L-R-L step closing. Practice arm swing draw.

exercises.name: Reaction hops
exercises.notes: Quick hops in random directions, react to imaginary cues.

exercises.name: Sprint in place
exercises.notes: Max effort 30s sprint in place. Pump arms fast.

exercises.name: Jump squats (Interval A)
exercises.notes: 40s work / 15s rest. Maximum height on each jump. Explode.

exercises.name: Push-ups (Interval A)
exercises.notes: 40s work / 15s rest. Fast, explosive push off floor.

exercises.name: Lateral shuffles (Interval A)
exercises.notes: 40s work / 15s rest. Shuffle 3m, touch floor at each end.

exercises.name: Block jumps (Interval A)
exercises.notes: 40s work / 15s rest. Simulate blocking, reach hands high.

exercises.name: Mountain climbers (Interval A)
exercises.notes: 40s work / 15s rest. Maximum knee drive speed.

exercises.name: Burpees (Interval B)
exercises.notes: 30s work / 10s rest. Full extension + jump. Fast tempo.

exercises.name: Plank shoulder taps (Interval B)
exercises.notes: 30s work / 10s rest. Tap shoulders fast, keep hips steady.

exercises.name: Tuck jumps (Interval B)
exercises.notes: 30s work / 10s rest. Knees to chest, land soft, repeat fast.

exercises.name: Quick feet (Interval B)
exercises.notes: 30s work / 10s rest. Patter feet in place as fast as possible.

exercises.name: Superman hold (Interval B)
exercises.notes: 30s work / 10s rest. Static back extension, squeeze glutes.

exercises.name: Single-leg ball tosses
exercises.notes: 12 reps each leg. Toss ball hand-to-hand while balancing on one foot.

exercises.name: Reactive balance wall toss
exercises.notes: 12 reps each leg. Stand on one foot, toss at wall, catch rebound.

exercises.name: Eyes-closed stand with arm movements
exercises.notes: 20s each leg. Stand on one leg, eyes closed, move arms in circles.

exercises.name: Single-leg hop + stick
exercises.notes: 8 reps each leg. Hop in random directions (fwd/side), hold landing.

exercises.name: Balance + overhead set to self
exercises.notes: 8 sets each leg. Stand on one foot, set volleyball straight up.

1.notes: Forearm pass rally at max speed. Count consecutive passes.

2.notes: Move while passing fast. Shuffle side-to-side. Keep platform solid.

3.notes: Alternating digs and passes at max speed. React low and high.

1.notes: Hit hard at wall, dig return, recover stance, repeat.

2.notes: Hit from wider angles. Sprint to save bad rebounds. Low ready stance.

3.notes: Continuous digs: hit, dig, self-set, hit again. No catching.

1.notes: Forearm pass to wall → set the return → forearm pass next. Alternating.

2.notes: Accelerate transitions. Stand closer. Fast hand/platform shifts.

3.notes: Forearm pass → jump set → back-set to wall. Advanced transitions.

1.notes: Low, fast sets aiming at specific wall spots. Quick wrist push.

2.notes: Quick sets to left/right target marks, quick shifting between.

3.notes: Kneeling quick sets to targets. Finger control only.

1.notes: Toss ball high, approach, jump, and hit wall. Reach high, snap wrist.

2.notes: Add directional targets. Aim for left/right wall areas.

3.notes: Approach jump hit → immediately drop back to defend rebound.

1.notes: Hit wall, let bounce once, hit again. Keep attack rally alive.

2.notes: Vary swing power. Hit hard, then roll shot, then hit hard again.

3.notes: No bounce attack rally. Volley spike hits directly against wall.

1.notes: Jump, land, jump immediately. Hold arms high, press over wall.

2.notes: Increase to sets of 8 jumps. Focus on quick leg loading.

3.notes: Sets of 10 rapid jumps. High tempo blocking conditioning.

1.notes: Shuffle left 2 steps → block jump → shuffle right 2 steps → block. 30s rounds.

2.notes: Use crossover steps instead of shuffles for faster lateral speed.

3.notes: Random side block. Shuffle, react to visual cue, block jump.

1.notes: Hit ball into wall at game speed. Read rebound angle, position to catch.

2.notes: Dig rebound instead of catch. React low and fast.

3.notes: Dig rebound, self-set, and hit again. Full reactive sequence.

1.notes: Fix eyes on wall mark. Forearm pass using peripheral vision to track ball.

2.notes: Alternate forearm and overhead passes in peripheral vision.

3.notes: Move left/right while passing in peripheral vision. High difficulty.

1.notes: Eyes closed. Visualize playing a full game. See, hear, and feel court.

2.notes: Visualize scoring the winning point. Feel the triumph and execution.

3.notes: Visualize locking down a block, digging, and making a perfect pass.

exercises.name: Full leg stretch sequence
exercises.notes: Stretch quads, hamstrings, and calves. Hold each for 30 seconds.

exercises.name: Upper body stretch sequence
exercises.notes: Stretch shoulders, chest, and arms. Release upper body tension.

exercises.name: Deep breathing
exercises.notes: Slow breathing, focus on recovery and relaxation.

exercises.name: Mental preparation
exercises.notes: Reflect on accomplishments, prepare to transition to rest days.
